title: Build RA³ Momentum Engine - NSE F&O Trading Dashboard with Shoonya API

requirements.text: Replace TrueData API integration with Shoonya API integration. Implement authentication flow using user ID, vendor code, IMEI, secret API key, and TOTP secret. Generate TOTP tokens programmatically for session authentication.

quotes: The app should fetch live option chain data using Shoonya API

acceptanceCriteria: Backend connects to Shoonya API using provided credentials
TOTP generation works correctly for authentication
Session tokens are obtained and managed automatically
API calls are authenticated with valid session tokens

requirements.text: Create a Settings panel in the frontend where users can configure Shoonya API credentials: user ID, vendor code, IMEI, secret API key, and TOTP secret. Store these credentials securely in the backend state. Include a connection test button to validate credentials.

quotes: include a settings panel where yI can configure these credentials

acceptanceCriteria: Settings panel UI allows input of all five credential fields
Credentials are saved to backend state when submitted
Test connection button validates credentials against Shoonya API
Clear success/error feedback is shown to user

requirements.text: Fetch and display live option chain data for both NIFTY and BANKNIFTY showing ±5 strikes around the ATM strike. For each strike, display: LTP, Call OI, Call OI Change, Put OI, Put OI Change, and Volume. Update data every 1 minute.

quotes: Show NIFTY & BANKNIFTY option chain near ATM strikes

acceptanceCriteria: Option chain displays 11 strikes total (ATM ± 5) for NIFTY
Option chain displays 11 strikes total (ATM ± 5) for BANKNIFTY
All six data fields are visible for each strike
Data refreshes automatically every 60 seconds
ATM strike is correctly identified based on current spot price

requirements.text: Highlight the strikes with highest Call OI and highest Put OI in the option chain table. Highlight strikes that show sudden OI change spikes based on intelligent threshold detection (using statistical analysis of recent OI changes).

quotes: Highlight highest Call OI and Put OI strikes

acceptanceCriteria: Highest Call OI strike is visually distinguished
Highest Put OI strike is visually distinguished
Strikes with abnormal OI change spikes are highlighted
Highlighting updates in real-time with data refresh

requirements.text: Implement market position analysis logic that detects: Long Build-Up (Price ↑ + OI ↑), Short Build-Up (Price ↓ + OI ↑), Short Covering (Price ↑ + OI ↓), Long Unwinding (Price ↓ + OI ↓). Display the current market bias as Bullish, Bearish, or Sideways for both NIFTY and BANKNIFTY.

quotes: Using OI change logic detect: Long Build-Up → Price ↑ + OI ↑, Short Build-Up → Price ↓ + OI ↑, Short Covering → Price ↑ + OI ↓, Long Unwinding → Price ↓ + OI ↓

acceptanceCriteria: Backend calculates market position based on price and OI movements
All four position types are correctly detected
Market bias (Bullish/Bearish/Sideways) is determined from position analysis
Analysis is performed separately for NIFTY and BANKNIFTY
Results update with each data refresh

requirements.text: Calculate real-time Put-Call Ratio (PCR) for NIFTY and BANKNIFTY. Display PCR strength categorized as: Strong Bullish, Bullish, Neutral, Bearish, or Strong Bearish. Show a visual meter/gauge representation of the PCR strength.

quotes: Display as: Strong Bullish, Bullish, Neutral, Bearish, Strong Bearish

acceptanceCriteria: PCR is calculated from total Put OI divided by total Call OI
PCR is correctly categorized into five strength levels
Visual meter/gauge component displays current PCR strength
Meter updates in real-time with data refresh
Separate PCR calculations for NIFTY and BANKNIFTY

requirements.text: Build a smart signal engine that generates trading signals (BUY CALL, BUY PUT, WAIT/NO TRADE) based on: Call OI resistance breaks, Put OI support breaks, sudden OI spike detection, PCR extreme levels, and momentum shift detection. Use intelligent thresholds based on statistical analysis.

quotes: Generate high-confidence alerts when: Call OI resistance breaks, Put OI support breaks, Sudden OI spike detected, PCR extreme levels, Momentum shift detected
Alert Thresholds - its depend on your inteligence

acceptanceCriteria: Signal engine evaluates all five trigger conditions
BUY CALL signals are generated when bullish conditions align
BUY PUT signals are generated when bearish conditions align
WAIT signal is shown when no clear trade setup exists
Thresholds are automatically determined using statistical methods
Signals are generated separately for NIFTY and BANKNIFTY

requirements.text: Create a Key Levels Panel that automatically identifies and displays: Strong resistance strikes (highest Call OI), Strong support strikes (highest Put OI), ATM strike, and potential breakout levels for both NIFTY and BANKNIFTY.

quotes: Automatically identify: Strong resistance strikes (highest Call OI), Strong support strikes (highest Put OI), ATM strike, Breakout levels

acceptanceCriteria: Panel displays the strike with highest Call OI as resistance
Panel displays the strike with highest Put OI as support
Current ATM strike is clearly shown
Breakout levels are calculated and displayed
All levels update automatically with data refresh
Separate key levels shown for NIFTY and BANKNIFTY

requirements.text: Implement an alert system that creates and displays alerts when: Market bias changes (Bullish/Bearish/Sideways shift), Support or resistance levels break, Momentum shift occurs, or High-volume spike is detected. Store and display alert history.

quotes: Create alerts when: Market bias changes, Support/resistance breaks, Momentum shift occurs, High-volume spike detected

acceptanceCriteria: Alerts are triggered for all four event types
Each alert includes timestamp, event type, and relevant details
Alert history is persisted and displayed in the UI
New alerts are shown prominently with visual/sound notification
Alerts can be dismissed or cleared from history

requirements.text: Design and implement a professional dark-themed trading dashboard UI featuring: live updating panels for option chain and analysis, bias meter visualization, signal cards for trading recommendations, alert history display, refresh countdown timer, and smooth animations throughout. Use a color scheme suitable for professional trading interfaces (avoid blue and purple unless part of data visualization).

quotes: Use a dark professional trading UI with: live updating panels, bias meter, signal cards, alert history, refresh timer, smooth animations

acceptanceCriteria: Dark theme is applied consistently across all components
Professional trading aesthetic with clear information hierarchy
All panels update smoothly without jarring transitions
Refresh timer shows countdown to next update
Signal cards are prominently displayed and easy to read
Alert history is accessible and well-organized
Animations enhance UX without causing distraction

constraints: Do not change the backend single-actor architecture
Do not edit immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Use only Motoko for backend logic
Use only React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn components for frontend
Data refresh interval must be exactly 1 minute (60 seconds)
Display exactly ±5 strikes (11 total) around ATM for each symbol
nonGoals: Integration with any API other than Shoonya API
Real-time WebSocket connections (polling every 1 minute is sufficient)
Historical data analysis beyond current session
Support for equity stocks or commodities (only NIFTY & BANKNIFTY options)
